question.label: Friction scan
question.name: What's been slower or harder than it should have been?
question.description: Invites them to name blockers without framing it as complaint.

assessment.note: [SKIP] no signal — planner bypassed, queue carried forward

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Open context
new_queue.name: Before we get into specifics, what's been most on your mind at work lately?

new_queue.label: Scope tradeoff
new_queue.name: What have you said no to this fortnight?

new_queue.label: Attention drift
new_queue.name: Where is your attention getting pulled that isn't part of the main work?

new_queue.label: Decision lag
new_queue.name: What decision are you waiting on that is slowing things down?

new_queue.label: Stakeholder signal
new_queue.name: How are your updates landing with the people who need them?

new_queue.label: Follow-up gap
new_queue.name: What tends to get lost after you share an update?

new_queue.label: Sustainable load
new_queue.name: What part of your load feels hardest to sustain right now?

new_queue.label: Momentum source
new_queue.name: What part of the work is still pulling you in?

new_queue.label: Focus friction
new_queue.name: What is making it hard to protect focus time?

new_queue.label: Sharper next step
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks feel steadier for you?
